prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Diagnostics, part of the Automotive & Powertrain scope. The observed field condition is: parasitic draw procedure order (SEQ). The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: OEM service info, OBD-II standards.
title: Fault diagnosis: Diagnostics (service call)
